pub mod sup
pub mod sup::atomics
pub struct sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl sup::atomics::BackoffState
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::failures(&self) -> u32
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::new(sup::BackoffSpec, u64) -> Self
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::next_delay(&self) -> core::time::Duration
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::observe_failure(&self)
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::observe_success(&self)
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::spec(&self) -> &sup::BackoffSpec
impl !core::marker::Freeze for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Send for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Sync for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Unpin for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl<T, U> core::convert::Into<U> for sup::atomics::BackoffState where U: core::convert::From<T>
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::into(self) -> U
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryFrom<U> for sup::atomics::BackoffState where U: core::convert::Into<T>
pub type sup::atomics::BackoffState::Error = core::convert::Infallible
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::try_from(U) -> core::result::Result<T, <T as core::convert::TryFrom<U>>::Error>
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryInto<U> for sup::atomics::BackoffState where U: core::convert::TryFrom<T>
pub type sup::atomics::BackoffState::Error = <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::try_into(self) -> core::result::Result<U, <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error>
impl<T> core::any::Any for sup::atomics::BackoffState where T: 'static + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::type_id(&self) -> core::any::TypeId
impl<T> core::borrow::Borrow<T> for sup::atomics::BackoffState where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::borrow(&self) -> &T
impl<T> core::borrow::BorrowMut<T> for sup::atomics::BackoffState where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::borrow_mut(&mut self) -> &mut T
impl<T> core::convert::From<T> for sup::atomics::BackoffState
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::from(T) -> T
impl<T> tracing::instrument::Instrument for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl<T> tracing::instrument::WithSubscriber for sup::atomics::BackoffState

pub struct sup::BackoffSpec
pub sup::BackoffSpec::factor: f64
pub sup::BackoffSpec::jitter: f64
pub sup::BackoffSpec::max: core::time::Duration
pub sup::BackoffSpec::start: core::time::Duration
impl sup::BackoffSpec
pub fn sup::BackoffSpec::fixed(core::time::Duration, core::time::Duration, f64) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for sup::BackoffSpec
pub fn sup::BackoffSpec::clone(&self) -> sup::BackoffSpec
impl core::default::Default for sup::BackoffSpec
pub fn sup::BackoffSpec::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for sup::BackoffSpec
pub fn sup::BackoffSpec::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for sup::BackoffSpec
impl core::marker::Freeze for sup::BackoffSpec
impl core::marker::Send for sup::BackoffSpec
impl core::marker::Sync for sup::BackoffSpec

impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for sup::BackoffSpec

pub fn sup::BackoffSpec::from(T) -> T
impl<T> tracing::instrument::Instrument for sup::BackoffSpec
impl<T> tracing::instrument::WithSubscriber for sup::BackoffSpec
pub struct sup::BackoffState
impl sup::atomics::BackoffState
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::failures(&self) -> u32
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::new(sup::BackoffSpec, u64) -> Self
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::next_delay(&self) -> core::time::Duration
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::observe_failure(&self)
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::observe_success(&self)
pub fn sup::atomics::BackoffState::spec(&self) -> &sup::BackoffSpec
impl !core::marker::Freeze for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Send for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Sync for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::Unpin for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for sup::atomics::BackoffState
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for sup::atomics::BackoffState

pub struct sup::Supervisor
impl sup::Supervisor
pub fn sup::Supervisor::add_child<S: sup::Supervised>(&mut self, sup::ChildSpec<S>) -> sup::ChildId
pub fn sup::Supervisor::handle(&self) -> sup::SupervisorHandle
pub fn sup::Supervisor::new(sup::RestartStrategy) -> Self
pub async fn sup::Supervisor::run(self) -> sup::SupExit
pub async fn sup::Supervisor::shutdown(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), sup::SupError>
pub fn sup::Supervisor::try_add_child<S: sup::Supervised>(&mut self, sup::ChildSpec<S>) -> core::result::Result<sup::ChildId, sup::SupError>
pub fn sup::Supervisor::with_shutdown_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for sup::Supervisor
impl !core::marker::Sync for sup::Supervisor

pub trait sup::Supervised: core::marker::Send + 'static
pub type sup::Supervised::Output: core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn sup::Supervised::name(&self) -> &str
pub fn sup::Supervised::run(&mut self) -> impl core::future::future::Future<Output = core::result::Result<Self::Output, sup::SupError>> + core::marker::Send
